steps.title: Interpret increasing by 400%
steps.content:
When a quantity is increased by a percentage, we add that percentage of the original to itself. A 400% increase adds 400% of $x$ to $x$:
$$x + 4x = 5x$$

steps.title: Set up and solve the equation
steps.content:
The problem states the result of this increase is 60:
$$5x = 60$$
Dividing both sides by 5:
$$x = 12$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
